name: French Silk Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 Squares bitter chocolate, melted and cooled to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter for 20 minutes until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar, creaming for an additional 20 minutes.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating for 5 minutes after each addition.
4. Incorporate the melted chocolate, beat for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in vanilla extract, beat for another 5 minutes.
6. Pour into the prepared pie shell and refrigerate overnight to allow the filling to firm and flavors to mellow.
7. Optionally top with unsweetened whipped cream and chocolate curls.
